nl_query: How many evaluation attempts have been superseded by a new cycle?
failed_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ea.id) AS num_superseded_attempts
FROM   evaluation_attempt ea
JOIN   answer_script sa ON sa.id = ea.script_id
WHERE  sa.lifecycle_status = 'ATTEMPTED'
  AND sa.evaluation_status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED'
  AND sa.block_status  = 'NONE'
  AND sa.scan_status   = 'SCANNED'
  AND sa.is_active      = TRUE
  AND sa.superseded_by_id IS NOT NULL;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): answer_script.superseded_by_script_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
